label: True corpus LinkGuard
description: Per-person field levels are selected with true corpus co-occurrence statistics.

label: Shuffled corpus stats
description: Per-person field levels are selected after independently shuffling quasi-identifier fields across personas, preserving marginals but breaking co-occurrence.

label: Global L1 generalization
description: Every persona receives the same level-1 quasi-identifier generalization, with no per-person uniqueness estimate.

label: Target-k suppression
description: Corpus-aware target-k field selection is retained, but selected fields are suppressed directly instead of using progressive generalization.
